subject: Weekly digest: canary track in North Europe | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-0477
body: Here is a progress summary for the canary plan in North Europe. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Frida Kahlo is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-0477. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: timeline, coordination.
